'''âj-r-y''' ('''kajaray''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anarchise|anarchise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anarchise|anarchise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajaray
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijaray|thijaray]] || [[word:jijaray|jijaray]] || [[word:shijaray|shijaray]] || [[word:kijaray|kijaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujaray|thuthujaray]] || [[word:jujujaray|jujujaray]] || [[word:shushujaray|shushujaray]] || [[word:kukujaray|kukujaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujaray|thujaray]] || [[word:jujaray|jujaray]] || [[word:shujaray|shujaray]] || [[word:kujaray|kujaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujaray|thujaray]] || [[word:jujaray|jujaray]] || [[word:shujaray|shujaray]] || [[word:kujaray|kujaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejaray|thejaray]] || [[word:jejaray|jejaray]] || [[word:shejaray|shejaray]] || [[word:kejaray|kejaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojaray|thothojaray]] || [[word:jojojaray|jojojaray]] || [[word:shoshojaray|shoshojaray]] || [[word:kokojaray|kokojaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojaray|thojaray]] || [[word:jojaray|jojaray]] || [[word:shojaray|shojaray]] || [[word:kojaray|kojaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojaray|thojaray]] || [[word:jojaray|jojaray]] || [[word:shojaray|shojaray]] || [[word:kojaray|kojaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjaray|thĂŠjaray]] || [[word:jĂŠjaray|jĂŠjaray]] || [[word:shĂŠjaray|shĂŠjaray]] || [[word:kĂŠjaray|kĂŠjaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajaray|thathajaray]] || [[word:jajajaray|jajajaray]] || [[word:shashajaray|shashajaray]] || [[word:kakajaray|kakajaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajaray|thajaray]] || [[word:jajaray|jajaray]] || [[word:shajaray|shajaray]] || [[word:kajaray|kajaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajaray|thajaray]] || [[word:jajaray|jajaray]] || [[word:shajaray|shajaray]] || [[word:kajaray|kajaray]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajaray|shajaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajaray|goshajaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajaray|gokishajaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajaraynĂŒ|shajaraynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajaraynknĂŒ|goshajaraynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaraynĂŒ|gokishajaraynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajarayshĂ«|shajarayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajaraynkshĂ«|goshajaraynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajarayshĂ«|gokishajarayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarayro|shajarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaraynkro|goshajaraynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarayro|gokishajarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaraymu|shajaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaraynkmu|goshajaraynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaraymu|gokishajaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajaraysher|shajaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajaraynksher|goshajaraynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajaraysher|gokishajaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajarayng|shajarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajaraynkng|goshajaraynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajarayng|gokishajarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajaraya|shajaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajaraynkya|goshajaraynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajaraya|gokishajaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajarayam|shajarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajaraynkyam|goshajaraynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajarayam|gokishajarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajaraynĂŒshĂ«|shajaraynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaraynknĂŒshĂ«|goshajaraynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajaraynĂŒshĂ«|gokishajaraynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaraynĂŒro|shajaraynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaraynknĂŒro|goshajaraynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaraynĂŒro|gokishajaraynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaraynĂŒmu|shajaraynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaraynknĂŒmu|goshajaraynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaraynĂŒmu|gokishajaraynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarayshĂ«nĂŒ|shajarayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaraynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajaraynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajarayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarayshĂ«ro|shajarayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaraynkshĂ«ro|goshajaraynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarayshĂ«ro|gokishajarayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarayshĂ«mu|shajarayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaraynkshĂ«mu|goshajaraynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarayshĂ«mu|gokishajarayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarayronĂŒ|shajarayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaraynkronĂŒ|goshajaraynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarayronĂŒ|gokishajarayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarayroshĂ«|shajarayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaraynkroshĂ«|goshajaraynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarayroshĂ«|gokishajarayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarayromu|shajarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaraynkromu|goshajaraynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarayromu|gokishajarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajaraymunĂŒ|shajaraymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaraynkmunĂŒ|goshajaraynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaraymunĂŒ|gokishajaraymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajaraymushĂ«|shajaraymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaraynkmushĂ«|goshajaraynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajaraymushĂ«|gokishajaraymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaraymuro|shajaraymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaraynkmuro|goshajaraynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaraymuro|gokishajaraymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
